hero.title: Premium Cigars & Coffee
hero.description: Experience luxury in every puff and sip of our finest coffee.

hero.title: Master Heritage
hero.desc: Indulge in the world of exclusive hand-rolled cigars, paired with our signature artisan coffee blends.

features.f1_desc: Each cigar is meticulously crafted by expert torcedores using selected tobacco leaves.
features.f2_desc: Our coffee beans are sourced from high-altitude estates and roasted to bring out complex flavor profiles.
features.f3_desc: A members-only environment dedicated to privacy and pure comfort.

home.quote: "A cigar is a ritual as well as a relaxation. It is a moment in time when nothing else matters."

story.p1: Founded with a passion for the unparalleled pairing of fine tobacco and rich caffeine, Master Cigars & Coffee has evolved from a simple private collection to a premier destination for connoisseurs.
story.p2: Our journey began in the volcanic soils of the Caribbean, where we discovered that the secret to the perfect smoke lies in slow aging and precise blending. We brought this philosophy home, pairing our cigars with meticulously selected coffee beans from the Indonesian archipelago.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: "To be the international gold standard in the cigar and coffee industry, where luxury meets tradition."

mission.title: Mission
mission.m1: Curating the world's finest coffee beans and tobacco.
mission.m3: Building an ecosystem of connoisseurs who share their passion.

values.label: Core Philosophy
values.title: Core Principles
values.v1_b: Uncompromising authenticity in the origin and quality of every product's materials.
values.v2_b: Presentation details designed for world-class aesthetics.
values.v3_b: Maintaining prestige and service standards for true connoisseurs.
values.v4_b: Building a brotherhood of enthusiasts in a premium atmosphere.

hero.label: Synergy & Growth
hero.title: Partners & Collaboration
hero.sub: Building an Ecosystem with Master Heritage

empty.title: No Partners Available
empty.desc: This category doesn't have any collaboration partners yet.

cta.title: Become a Collaborator
cta.desc: Want to align your brand with the pinnacle of luxury? We are always open to exploring new synergies and creative partnerships.

story.desc: Master Cigars & Coffee is not just a brand; it is a lifestyle asset. We offer unique investment instruments for those who understand the value of long-term prestige.

pillars.p1_d: Own a Master Lounge in major metropolises with full supply chain support.
pillars.p2_d: Investment portfolio backed by physical aged tobacco stock and mountain plantation coffee lands.
pillars.p3_d: Participate in our digital expansion and international shipping logistics infrastructure.

retail.title: Retail / Single Items
retail.desc: Buy retail products at affordable and premium prices.

point.title: Point Corner
point.desc: Exclusive Semi Bold & Full Facility services.
